NOTEX.Title: Notex
NOTEX.ScratchPlaceholder: Jot something down quick — it saves automatically
NOTEX.SelectHint: Select a note on the left or create a new one.
NOTEX.DeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This cannot be undone.
NOTEX.EmptyNote: Empty note. Click Edit to write.
NOTEX.Settings.LanguageHint: Language of the Notex interface. Personal — affects only you.
NOTEX.DeleteFolderConfirm: Delete folder {name}? Notes inside it will move to the parent folder, not be deleted.
